creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
New port cxterm, uploaded as
	ftp.cdrom.com:/pub/FreeBSD/cxterm-portball.tgz
	It supports display and input of Chinese characters (both simple
	and complex forms).

	By chance could a "chinese" catagory be added like the japanese and
	russan ones?

Fix: 

n/a

	n/a
